actions.name: Dual Wield
actions.description:
Trigger: The user declares a [Missile], [Pulse], or [Ray] attack.

Effect: The attack loses 30% of their Power and gains @Trait[double-strike], or gain +2 to its existing [X-Strike] trait, for the rest of the user's Activation.

system.description:
Trigger: The user declares a @Trait[missile], @Trait[pulse], or @Trait[ray] attack.

Effect: The user spends 2 PP at @Trait[interrupt-5]. If the declared Attack lacks @Trait[x-strike], the attack loses -30% Power and gains @Trait[double-strike] until it is resolved. If the declared Attack already possessed @Trait[x-strike], the attack instead gains +30% Power and EHR and @Trait[priority-20] until it is resolved.
